summary.headline: Grounded-source training flow repaired
summary.subheadline: Code paths now use grounded partner sources and projected eval scenarios instead of the stale enriched_scenarios artifact, and train_v10 is assembled.

changes: Added grounded_scenarios helper and rewired project_eval to use it.
Patched partner training slices to consume grounded source scenarios.
Rebuilt partner_slices with 63 consensus, 12 corrections, 22 phrase seeds, and 1 ambient row.
Rewrote generate_tts to synthesize from output/scenarios/*.json.
Added --local transcription fallback alias and Thor-default ASR URL behavior.
Built data/training/deberta/train_v10.jsonl from train_v8 + grounded partner slices + 49 Whisper-noisy rows.
Refreshed high-signal stale docs/contracts/handoffs that still treated enriched_scenarios as canonical.
next_steps: Decide whether partner_slices should keep the current filenames or move to grounded_* names.
Add append or per-scenario output mode to transcribe_fixtures to avoid clobbering transcriptions.jsonl on smoke runs.
Mine transcriptions.jsonl into training rows that preserve clean_text + whisper_text pairs for noise-aware augmentation.
Fold compound_extraction_gaps and reviewed failure buckets into a train_v10b follow-on dataset.
Investigate why evaluate-model burns CPU for minutes without emitting a result JSON in this environment.
Run the narrow DeBERTa eval surface once the eval runner behavior is fixed.
Run the broader grounded scenario pipeline suite after retrain only as a compatibility check, not as the primary model gate.
Decide whether to regenerate all projected scenarios now or only the 5 grounded scenarios in the active lane.
Refresh lower-priority historical scratch/docs surfaces that still mention enriched_scenarios.
Start the actual V10 retrain from train_v10.jsonl once the eval-run blocker is understood.
